summary: Bind the first public Windows beta documentation to the exact signed candidate and completed release evidence.

decisions.decision: Publish only the exact signed Windows setup produced from product commit dbee183, with byte length 208699552, SHA-256 D196878A49804F852C49A81ACBB4AC5C232A88DA737F2D756F9B6376E435A588, and a valid Scott Converse Windows signature. Treat the release-documentation delta after dbee183 as non-runtime-only.
decisions.rationale: The product commit passed hosted CI and the isolated similarity gate, the signed installer passed its lifecycle, the literal one-hour soak passed, Radeon 780M performance passed, and the same signed bytes completed the clean Windows Sandbox newcomer render-and-export walkthrough.

testEvidence.criterion: The exact beta runtime must pass all release-critical automated, reliability, performance, installer, provenance, similarity, and clean newcomer gates.
testEvidence.test: Review the retained literal soak, Radeon 780M profile, signed installer lifecycle, exact-head hosted CI, isolated similarity run, and clean Windows Sandbox walkthrough bound to dbee183.

red.command: GitHub Actions workflow_dispatch run concurrent with the required dbee183 pull-request run
red.outcome: RED: the redundant run exposed a 250 ms off-monitor lifecycle race even though the required run passed. The harness was corrected to wait for three stable probes for at least 600 ms; no product runtime code changed.

green.command: One bounded evidence review of dbee183 retained outputs and hosted runs 29803652701 and 29803696193
green.outcome: GREEN: literal soak completed 3600.008 seconds with 120 successful cycles, one expected crash and zero unexpected failures; Radeon 780M rendered 2,000,000 triangles at 59.9401 average FPS with 16.8 ms p95 frame time; signed setup lifecycle and clean Sandbox install/render/export passed; all eight hosted CI jobs and the isolated similarity gate passed.

questions: No owner decision remains: the owner explicitly directed the implementer to finish and ship the Windows beta.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
